description: Canonical manifest declaring which fields are tunable by the offline loop optimizer, which are locked runtime contracts, and which are deferred prompt-pack entrypoints.

tunableFields.name: convergenceThreshold
tunableFields.description: General convergence sensitivity threshold. Lower values require more convergence before stopping.

tunableFields.name: stuckThreshold
tunableFields.description: Number of consecutive no-progress iterations before stuck recovery is triggered.

tunableFields.name: maxIterations
tunableFields.description: Hard ceiling on loop iterations. Controls maximum compute budget.

tunableFields.name: noProgressThreshold
tunableFields.description: New-info ratio below which an iteration is classified as no-progress.

tunableFields.name: compositeStopScore
tunableFields.description: Weighted stop score needed before guard evaluation passes.

lockedFields.name: type
lockedFields.reason: JSONL schema contract — record type discriminator must not change.

lockedFields.name: stopReason
lockedFields.reason: Stop-reason enum is a runtime contract shared across all consumers.

lockedFields.name: legalStop
lockedFields.reason: Legal-stop record structure is a runtime contract used by reducers and dashboards.

lockedFields.name: fileProtection
lockedFields.reason: File protection policies are governance contracts, not tunable parameters.

lockedFields.name: reducer
lockedFields.reason: Reducer configuration defines the state-management contract.

lockedFields.name: sessionId
lockedFields.reason: Session identity is a lifecycle contract.

lockedFields.name: mode
lockedFields.reason: Product mode (research/review) is an identity field, not a tunable.

lockedFields.name: reviewDimensions
lockedFields.reason: Review dimensions define the product scope, not numeric tuning surface.

deferredPromptPackEntrypoints.name: iterationPromptPack
deferredPromptPackEntrypoints.reason: Phase 4b — requires behavioral test suite + 2+ corpus families before prompt optimization is safe.

deferredPromptPackEntrypoints.name: recoveryPromptPack
deferredPromptPackEntrypoints.reason: Phase 4b — recovery strategy prompts must be tested via behavioral suites before optimization.

deferredPromptPackEntrypoints.name: synthesisPromptPack
deferredPromptPackEntrypoints.reason: Phase 4b — synthesis prompt quality requires end-to-end behavioral validation.

autoPromotionPrerequisites: Phase 3 behavioral suites exist and pass
At least 2 compatible corpus families available
governance.rollbackPolicy: All promoted configs must be reversible via the prior baseline config stored in the audit trail.
